+# Evaluator proposal
+
+## Evaluator type
+
+What model or task type should this evaluator support?
+
+## Input / output contract
+
+Describe required inputs, outputs, and expected metrics.
+
+## Success metrics
+
+Which metrics should Ares gate on for this evaluator?
+
+## Slice behavior
+
+What slices matter and which should be considered critical?
+
+## Implementation sketch
+
+Describe how this could fit into `BaseEvaluator` in fewer than 50 lines of custom logic.
+
+## Validation plan
+
+How should this evaluator be tested?
